texto: When you have a personal relationship with God, it’s like being close friends with the most powerful and influential people in the world who have keys to open every door for you.And best of all, knowing the One helps us to know ourselves and make sense of who we are, why we’re here and what life is all about.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Mackintosh: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “When you have a personal relationship with God, it’s like being close friends with the most power…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, inspiracional, meditation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
